creator: zeug@tuxproject.de
text:
Ehm. Yep. Automated package list creation failed. According to
CMakeLists, the license/ files are not even considered. Sigh...

-----------------------------------

    diff -ruN alt/Makefile neu/Makefile
    --- alt/Makefile        2013-02-26 21:12:07.000000000 +0100
    +++ neu/Makefile        2013-03-01 21:11:05.000000000 +0100
    @@ -1,10 +1,10 @@
    -# $FreeBSD: ports/graphics/nomacs/Makefile,v 1.2 2012/11/17 05:58:15 svnexp Exp $
    +# $FreeBSD$
     
     PORTNAME=      nomacs
    -PORTVERSION=   0.4.0
    +PORTVERSION=   1.0.0
     CATEGORIES=    graphics
     MASTER_SITES=  SF/nomacs/nomacs-${PORTVERSION}/
    -DISTNAME=      ${PORTNAME}-${PORTVERSION}-source
    +DISTNAME=      ${PORTNAME}-${PORTVERSION}
     
     MAINTAINER=    bsd@tuxproject.de
     COMMENT=       Small, fast and free image viewer
    @@ -14,13 +14,14 @@
     LIB_DEPENDS=   exiv2:${PORTSDIR}/graphics/exiv2 \
                    sysinfo:${PORTSDIR}/devel/libsysinfo
     
    -USE_ZIP=       yes
    +USE_BZIP2=     yes
     USE_CMAKE=     yes
     USE_QT4=       gui network linguist_build moc_build \
                    qmake_build rcc_build uic_build
     LDFLAGS+=      -lsysinfo -lkvm
    -# no RAW support for now.
    -CMAKE_ARGS+=   -DENABLE_RAW=0
    -NO_WRKSUBDIR=  yes
    +WRKTOP=                ${WRKDIR}
    +WRKSUBDIR=     ${PORTNAME}-${PORTVERSION}
    +WRKSRC=                ${WRKTOP}/${WRKSUBDIR}
    +CMAKE_ARGS+=    -DENABLE_RAW=0
     
     .include <bsd.port.mk>
    diff -ruN alt/distinfo neu/distinfo
    --- alt/distinfo        2013-02-26 21:12:07.000000000 +0100
    +++ neu/distinfo        2013-03-01 20:10:21.000000000 +0100
    @@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
    -SHA256 (nomacs-0.4.0-source.zip) = 3432d55d4de23c365912f0c796deb2e25184efdbd8a81304f15914e3fe4da2c7
    -SIZE (nomacs-0.4.0-source.zip) = 1112306
    +SHA256 (nomacs-1.0.0.tar.bz2) = bf2a0a9ecb35551dc8ed25c0db95c1183b3771a2ce9e2a41d7e1d230bac2c5f2
    +SIZE (nomacs-1.0.0.tar.bz2) = 803404
    diff -ruN alt/pkg-plist neu/pkg-plist
    --- alt/pkg-plist       2013-02-26 21:12:07.000000000 +0100
    +++ neu/pkg-plist       2013-03-02 00:36:19.000000000 +0100
    @@ -1,11 +1,17 @@
     bin/nomacs
     share/applications/nomacs.desktop
    +share/man/man1/nomacs.1
     share/nomacs/translations/nomacs_als.qm
    +share/nomacs/translations/nomacs_az.qm
     share/nomacs/translations/nomacs_de.qm
     share/nomacs/translations/nomacs_en.qm
    +share/nomacs/translations/nomacs_es.qm
    +share/nomacs/translations/nomacs_pl.qm
     share/nomacs/translations/nomacs_ru.qm
    +share/nomacs/translations/nomacs_sk.qm
     share/nomacs/translations/nomacs_zh.qm
     share/pixmaps/nomacs.png
     @dirrm share/nomacs/translations
     @dirrm share/nomacs
    -@dirrmtry share/applications
    +@dirrm share/man/man1
    +@dirrm share/man
